zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen於大約1297年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托時，他的父親Sir John Cusack27歲，母親Margaret FitzGerald29歲。他於1322年與Joan Tuite在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯吉勒結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年之後在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯登善林吉勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen于大约1297年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托时，他的父亲Sir John Cusack27岁，母亲Margaret FitzGerald29岁。他于1322年与Joan Tuite在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯吉勒结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年之后在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯登善林吉勒。

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen was born about 1297, in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir John Cusack, was 27 and his mother, Margaret FitzGerald, was 29. He married Joan Tuite in 1322, in Killeen, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1386, in Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen est né environ 1297, à Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir John Cusack, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzGerald, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan Tuite en 1322, à Killeen, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1386, à Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen um 1297 in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Cusack 27 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzGerald 29. Er hat 1322 in Killeen, County Meath, Irland Joan Tuite geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1386 in Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen è nato il circa 1297 nel Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir John Cusack, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzGerald, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan Tuite nel 1322, nel Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1386, nel Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeenが約1297年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウンで生まれた時，父Sir John Cusackは27歳，母Margaret FitzGeraldは29歳であった。1322年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスキリーンでJoan Tuiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年以後にアイルランドコウントイ メアスダンシャウリンキリーンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen(이)가 대략 1297년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 그라르드스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cusack(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzGerald(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1322년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 킬린에서 Joan Tuite(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 이후 아일랜드 카운티 미스 던쇼그h린 킬린에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen nasceu aproximadamente 1297, em Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir John Cusack, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzGerald, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Tuite em 1322, em Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1386, em Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen родился около 1297 г. в местности джиррардстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Cusack было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzGerald, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Tuite в 1322 г. в местности киллин, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1386 г. в местности киллин, дуншолинь, коунти мит, Ирландия.

sm.about 1297–after 1386: e tusa o le 1297–ina ua ma'ea le 1386

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen nació aproximadamente 1297, en Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir John Cusack, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret FitzGerald, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joan Tuite en 1322, en Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1386, en Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlanda.
